critic.diagnosis: Same dual-panel layout, same line trends, same color mapping, and same annotated values. Differences: generated uses serif/LaTeX-style typography vs reference sans-serif; markers on data points are missing or much less visible in the generated version; value labels overlap more densely (e.g., '78%/72%' cluster, '50%/48%' overlap) due to tighter spacing; legend box and overall plot proportions slightly compressed horizontally; gridlines fainter. Structure and data are faithful but visual styling and marker rendering noticeably differ.
